findings.evidence: `rg` shows adjacent public names `conditionallyIIDWith_of_forall_rectangles`, `conditionallyIIDWith_iff_forall_rectangles`, and `conditionallyIID_iff_exists_forall_rectangles` in `Exchangeability/ConditionallyIID.lean`, while line 39 introduces `theorem conditional_iid_from_directing_measure ... (h_rect : ∀ ... rectangles ...) : ConditionallyIID μ X`.
findings.fix: Rename it to a lower-camel conclusion-outward name consistent with the adjacent API, e.g. `conditionallyIID_of_forall_rectangles` or `conditionallyIID_of_directing_forall_rectangles`.
findings.issue: `conditional_iid_from_directing_measure` is the only public conditional-i.i.d. theorem here using roadmap-style snake case and its name says only “from directing measure”, while the theorem also requires rectangle factorization.

summary: One public theorem name does not match the adjacent `ConditionallyIID` API and underspecifies the hypothesis it actually uses.
